name: Narayan Helen Liebenson
bio: Narayan Helen Liebenson has been a Guiding Teacher at Cambridge Insight Meditation Center since 1985, making her one of CIMC's longest-serving teachers. She is also a guiding teacher at the Insight Meditation Society in Barre, Massachusetts. Her teaching emphasizes the cultivation of awareness in daily life, and she is the author of 'The Magnanimous Heart.'
